plugins.name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
plugins.description: AI agents v13.0.0 — New /autonomous slash command that chains /launch-pad → /supervisor for a single requirement, with opt-in multi-iteration re-planning (--allow-multi-iteration) gated on two existing SUPERVISOR_RESULT signals (rubric_score N<M with user-merge confirmation; failed + inter_subtask_gap on this iteration's brief). Foreground-assisted automation — Launch Pad Phase 6, NO-GO, Plan Review FAIL × 3, Supervisor adjudication 4-option, and the loop's rubric gate all bubble AskUserQuestion in-session. v13 is purely additive: no new agent, no new hook, no schema change, no source change to any existing file. Preserves all v12.2.0 capabilities (Agent Teams graduation, Outcomes Rubric, /dreaming, webhook hook), v12.1.0 documentation increments (Memory Tool, Structured Outputs, SDK-only Advisor), v12.0.0 reliability primitives (provides/requires contracts, pre-spawn verification, 4-option adjudication, effort-tier discipline, WORKER_RESULT schema_version 2), and prior v11/v10 layers. 13 agent roles, 50 reusable skills, 14 quality gate hooks, 12 slash commands, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
